title: Moloch
review: I thought this was a solid folklore/cult horror. It has shades of {Hereditary} or even {The Wicker Man}. It's a bit low in terms of scariness but it's a compelling story, and they found a cool bog to to film in. I don't want to say too much about it, because although it's not a perfect movie, I do recommend it and I think the mystery and reveals are my favourite things about it.
